twiki. Added lines 1-12: This page will serve mostly to point out differences between our lab coding style and the Google style guides, which we'll take as our baseline. Following are the relevant guides that you should read through as necessary: * G

des that you should read through as necessary: * Google C++ Style Guide (which we refer to when writing C) * Google Python Style Guide C Certain pieces of code that are related to specific modules get their own files (module.c/h). Because of this,

get their own files (module.c/h). Because of this, we digress from Google's function naming convention and add the module name in lowercase at the front of each of the functions within these modules. For example: moduleRegularFunction(...) Other than
